name: Python Calculator
description: Build a Calculator class with four arithmetic methods and pytest tests.
prompt:
Build a new Python calculator project from scratch in the current directory.

Implement a Calculator class in calculator.py with these methods:
  - add(a, b) returns a + b
  - subtract(a, b) returns a - b
  - multiply(a, b) returns a * b
  - divide(a, b) returns a / b, raises ValueError when b is 0

Write pytest tests in test_calculator.py that cover all four operations (at least two cases each) and confirm ValueError is raised on divide-by-zero.

Set up a virtual environment and install pytest:
  python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install pytest -q

Run the tests to confirm they all pass:
  .venv/bin/python -m pytest -v

No stubs — implement real arithmetic logic.
